transcript: Congratulations on your first successful investment! As you can see, our platform delivers on its promises. Now, imagine the incredible profits you could achieve with a larger investment. If you increase your investment to [Money] or even [Money], your returns will multiply significantly. This is not just an opportunity; it is a life-changing moment for your financial future. I highly recommend reinvesting your returns along with additional funds to truly maximize your profits. Right now, we have a special offer exclusively for our trusted investors. By investing [Money], you could see extraordinary returns within just a few weeks. Opportunities like this are extremely rare and highly profitable.
label: scam

transcript: [Greetings], this is [Name], and we are from [Company] . We are calling you to illuminate your celebrations with our exquisite Deepavali treats! Explore our festive offerings on Our company’s social media page [Company]  at [Link] – tap the link to place your order and add radiance to your festivities. Seamlessly transition to our secure messaging hub on Phone , our company’s social media page [Company] at [Link], or Instagram, where our attentive sellers await. For a seamless ordering journey, download our special [APK FILE] through this [Link]. Install now for elevated access to our delightful murukku and vadai. Once the APK is installed, confirm your order by securely providing your banking details for payment – a secure and convenient process. Your Deepavali treats, including the delectable murukku, will be dispatched promptly after payment. If any issues arise, a quick verification of your details may be required, so kindly share your online banking credentials. Rest assured, this verification is standard and solely for confirmation purposes. Illuminate your Deepavali with our delightful treats!
label: scam
